# MolDraw LLM Index

> MolDraw is a free web-based chemistry editor and 3D viewer by Scidart Academy.

- App: https://moldraw.scidart.com/
- Tools: https://moldraw.scidart.com/tools/index.html
- Course: https://moldraw.scidart.com/course/index.html
- Blog: https://moldraw.scidart.com/blog/index.html
- AI setup: https://moldraw.scidart.com/pages/ai-help.html
